title: Update event reader for loop schema v2 (bump + surface new fields)
description: Loop framework bumped LOOP_EVENT_SCHEMA_VERSION from 1 to 2 (loop runners/lib/event_log.sh:31). Two new required fields landed: llm_exited gained total_cost_usd/input_tokens/output_tokens/num_turns; hard_failure gained a closed-enum reason. This repo's parser hardcodes SUPPORTED_SCHEMA_VERSION=1, so once any pane restarts it will reject every event. Fix: bump to 2, update fixtures, surface reason in hard_failure_stats, surface cost/token totals in stats + CLI + TUI.
close_reason: schema_version bump to 2 + surfaced hard_failure.reason and llm_exited cost/token totals in stats CLI + TUI; 119 tests pass, pre-commit clean
